titleStmt.title: SII 41.120: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 120. (A.R. No. 119 of 1905.) Tiruvālīśvaram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vālīśvara temple at Tiruvālīśvaram.

summary.p: Vaṭṭeluttu. Related to the above three inscriptions. This records the sale of a vēli of land by the mahāsabhā of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to Ambalavaṉ Niṟāḍi of Piḍavūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟutta korājarājakesarivaṉmarkku yāṇṭu 10 1 Ivvāṇṭu rā[ja]rajavaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷi nāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī rājarājac caruppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom coṇāṭṭu vaṭakaraip piṭavūr nāṭṭuppiṭavū
kkuṭutta pūmiyāvatu nam vaṭapaṭākai veññīrkkaraip poḻikku vaṭakku śrīvālīśvara vatikkuk kiḻakku śrīvāsudeva vāykkālukkut teṟkku Oṉpatāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu śrīvālīśvaravatikkuk kiḻakkut teṟkaṭaiyak kāṇi Araikkāṇik kottattuk kiḻakku nōkki kaṭi yo
Itaṉukkut teṟkuṅ kiḻellai kaṭiñaikku mēkkum Ivvicainta perunāṉ kellaiyiṉuṭkiṭanta nila vvūr nilamaḷavu kolāl vaṭaiñcili Aṭaiya vēli nilam śrīkoyil vaḷākamuṅ kalluṅ kaḻiccu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷa
mahāsabhaiyom piṭavūruṭaiyāṉ Ampalavaṉiṟāṭikku Innilam velikkum Emmilicainta vi vvilaiyaṟak koṇṭu Ituvey vilaiyolaiyum poruṭcelavolaiyumākavum vilaimāvaṟuti poruṭ celavolai Itu vEṟu kāṭṭak kaṭavaṉallā
la volai ceytu kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom piṭavūruṭaiyāṉ Ampalavaṉiṟāṭikku Innilattukkuk kākkavipperuṅkālil niṉṟu nirpāyuṅkālkaḷāl munnāḷilor niṉṟu nirpāyappeṟuvatākavum Innāṉkellaiyuḷakappaṭṭa nilattil koyil vaḷākamuṅ ka
Ikkaṭiñaikkarait tiruvāliśvarattu devarkku nicatam Uḻakku neyyāloru tirunontāviḷakku muṭṭāmalerippatākavum Ipparicā viṟṟu vilaiyolai ceytu kuṭuttōm mahāsabhaiyom piṭavūruṭaiyāṉ Ampalavaṉiṟāṭikku muvāyiratteṇma brahmapriyaṉāṉa
ṉ patiṉāyiratteṇmap peruntiṇaiyāṉa veḷāṉ cavai Eḻuttu Ivvūru sabhaikkaṇakkaṉ maṅkalliyaṉ paṭāraṉ capai Eḻuttu Ivvūru capaikkaṇakkaṉ paṭāraṉ cātta ṉeḻuttu Ippa
Digital edition of SII 41.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
